title: River Sizing (Value/Bluff)
description: Correct sizing on river for value vs bluff — polar vs merged
coreRule: River: thin value = 33-50%, strong value = 75%+, nuts = overbet. Bluff sizing matches value sizing для balance.

decisions.description: BTN open, BB called. A-7-3-2-5 board. Hero TPTK. Checked to hero on river. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Thin value 40% pot. Get called by Ax worse kicker + middle pairs.
explanation.check: Some check OK — bluff catcher for BB.
explanation.default: Thin value = small sizing 33-50%. Не overbet AJ.

decisions.description: 9-6-5-2h-K. Hero has straight flush! BB checks river. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Absolute nuts = overbet 150% pot. Extract max from sets/flushes/straights.
explanation.default: Straight flush на WET board — overbet for max value. Polarize.

decisions.description: Q-7-3-5-2 bricked. Hero AK missed. BB checks river. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Bluff overbet matching value range (QQ/AA would overbet). 75% pot.
explanation.check: Give up also viable with blockers.
explanation.default: Polar river bluff = same sizing as nuts. Blockers (AK) ideal.

decisions.description: J-7-2-4-9 dry run-out. Hero QQ. BB checks river. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Merged value 50% — get called by Jx, worse overpairs.
explanation.default: Overpair с уязвимостью = 50% sizing (merged). Не overbet.

decisions.description: T-7-2-9-J (straight possible 8x, FD completes). Hero KK. BB checks. Action?

explanation.check: ✓ KK loses to straight/flush/two pair. Bluff catcher — check behind.
explanation.bet: Thin value OK if small (33%). Never overbet — folds out worse.
explanation.default: KK на scary river = often check behind.

decisions.description: A-5-3-Q-9. Hero missed 76 air. BB checks. Action?

explanation.check: ✓ No blockers to value, no good bluff representation. Give up.
explanation.bet: Occasional bluff — match value sizing if going.
explanation.default: Air без blockers river = mostly give up.
